---
title: "Data Strategy & Preprocessing"
---

## Primary Data Source
Our main data source is the **YÖK Atlas "Lisans Atlası"** module. Instead of relying on static Excel sheets, we dynamically queried the data directly into the R environment.

## Extraction Tool
We utilized the **`thestats`** R package (developed by M. Çavuş and O. Aydın) to extract comprehensive data regarding Industrial Engineering programs in Turkey. 

## Variables & Data Dictionary
The dataset encompasses time-series data from 2018 to 2025. Key variables include:

* `University_Type`: State vs. Foundation universities.
* `Base_Score`: Minimum placement scores for the department.
* `Success_Ranking`: National ranking of the admitted students.
* `Academic_Staff`: Total number of professors, associate professors, etc.
* `Erasmus_Mobility`: Incoming and outgoing exchange student traffic.

*(Note: The R codes used for data extraction and cleaning will be displayed in the Analysis section.)*
